title: 5. Lab - Implementing Collaborative Planning and Execution

blocks.content: In this lab, you will configure a cooperative multi-agent workflow: a Coordinator agent receives user instructions, plans actions, routes a scan request to a Security agent, and writes a compliance report file.
Create the local router config and launch the central daemon:
Start the security script which runs a local scan tool and registers itself with the router daemon on port 8090:
Run the coordinator agent CLI command to execute the plan. The coordinator calls the registered security agent, waits for results, and prints reports:

blocks.code: adk run --coordinator --prompt "Scan the codebase folder src/app and output compliance results."

blocks.title: Trace Playback Verification
blocks.content: Open http://localhost:8501 to check step tracing. You should see a routing loop: Coordinator -> Security Agent (runs tool) -> Coordinator (compiles report).
